message.content:
To provide an exhaustive description of the visual elements in the trim/timeline tool screenshot, we analyze every UI component, focusing on colors, positions, and details (including the timeline and waveform):


### **1. Top-Level UI & Header**
- **Background**: Dark gray (near-black) throughout the interface.  
- **Header Bar**:  
  - Left: "Vault v.01" (white text, left-aligned).  
  - Right: "v.01 • READY" (white text, right-aligned).  
- **Section Headers**:  
  - "FIG. 01 – INPUT" (gray text, left-aligned, below the header).  
  - "SOURCE" (gray text, right-aligned, next to "FIG. 01 – INPUT").  
- **URL Input Field**:  
  - Background: Dark gray (with a thin orange border).  
  - Text: "https://youtube.com/watch?v=test123" (white text, left-aligned).  
  - Right-side button: Orange (coral) square with a white right-arrow icon.  
- **Detection Badge**:  
  - "• YOUTUBE DETECTED" (red dot + gray text, left-aligned, below the URL field).  


### **2. Video Preview Section**
- **Video Thumbnail**:  
  - Image: A curved library shelf (dark blue/gray tones, high-contrast lighting).  
  - Play Button: White circle with a white triangle (centered on the thumbnail).  
  - Top-right Corner: "2:27" (white text, indicating video duration).  
- **Video Title & Metadata**:  
  - Title: "Building a $10,000 PC Build in 2026" (white text, centered below the thumbnail).  
  - Subtitle: "PIXELFORGE • 581K VIEWS" (gray text, centered below the title).  


### **3. Video/Audio Format Selection**
- **Tabs**:  
  - "Video" (white text, left-aligned, underlined with an orange line).  
  - "Audio" (gray text, right-aligned, no underline).  
- **Resolution Options** (list, left-aligned):  
  - **2160p (60FPS)**: White checkmark (left), white text, "0.18 GB" (gray text, right).  
  - **1080p (60FPS)**: White text, "81.0 MB" (gray text, right).  
  - **720p (30FPS)**: White text, "40.4 MB" (gray text, right).  
  - **480p (30FPS)**: White text, "20.9 MB" (gray text, right).  
  - **360p (30FPS)**: White text, "7.7 MB" (gray text, right).  


### **4. Trim Section (Timeline Tool)**
- **Header**:  
  - "Trim" (white text, left-aligned).  
  - "COLLAPSE" (gray text, right-aligned, with a small upward arrow icon).  
- **Timeline Bar**:  
  - Background: Dark gray.  
  - Left: "TIMELINE" (gray text, with a red "X" icon).  
  - Right: "2:27 / 2:27" (white text, indicating current/total duration).  
- **Waveform**:  
  - **Color**: Bright orange (coral) vertical bars (representing audio levels).  
  - **Structure**: Continuous waveform spanning the width of the timeline, with varying bar heights (peaks and valleys).  
  - **Vertical Line**: A thin white line (playhead) crosses the waveform horizontally, positioned at the 2:27 mark (right edge of the timeline).  
- **Timeline Markers**:  
  - **Left Edge**: No visible vertical bar/handle (the waveform starts at the leftmost point of the timeline).  
  - **Right Edge**: No visible vertical bar/handle (the waveform ends at the rightmost point of the timeline).  


### **5. Bottom Navigation & Action Button**
- **Tabs**:  
  - "VAULT" (white text, left-aligned, with a brown "N" icon).  
  - "ARCHIVE" (gray text, center-aligned, with a document icon).  
  - "TUNE" (gray text, right-aligned, with a gear icon).  
- **Action Button**:  
  - "Save to vault 2160P" (white text, left-aligned).  
  - Icon: White download arrow (left of the text).  
  - Background: Light beige (off-white).  


### **Summary of Colored Elements**
| **Element**               | **Location**       | **Color**       |  
|---------------------------|--------------------|-----------------|  
| URL field border          | Top-middle         | Orange (coral)  |  
| URL button                | Top-right          | Orange (coral)  |  
| Video tab underline       | Middle             | Orange (coral)  |  
| Timeline waveform         | Middle             | Orange (coral)  |  
| Detection dot             | Top-middle         | Red             |  
| Timeline "X" icon         | Middle             | Red             |  


### **Key Observations**
- The timeline waveform is the most prominent colored element (orange), with a white playhead line.  
- No vertical handles/grabbers are visible on the left/right edges of the trimmed region (the waveform spans the full timeline width).  
- All colored elements are high-contrast (orange, red, white) against the dark background for clarity.  

This breakdown covers every visual detail, including colors, positions, and the absence of specific elements (e.g., vertical handles) as requested.
